blended.narrative: Stevens Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 26 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,890 ft. Looking ahead, 38 inches possible over the next 14 days.

recent_conditions.narrative: 19.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 16" over the past week. Current depth: 48".
